entries.speaker: narrator
lines: The water surges. Something vast stirs beneath the
surface — tendrils of grey-green light reaching for the walls.

entries.speaker: narrator
lines: The corruption recedes from her eyes. For a moment,
the spirit underneath is visible — ancient, tired, asking
